title: Routing Observation
description: A single observed routing decision — what was sent where and how it went

task_summary.description: Brief description of what was being asked/done

task_type.description: Category tag (e.g., code-review, research, brainstorm, debug, refactor, explain, compare)

routed_from.description: Where the task originated (e.g., claude-code, user-manual, codex)

routed_to.description: LLM slug the task was sent to

routing_reason.description: Why this LLM was chosen — the user's stated rationale

context_given.description: What context/artifacts were passed along (file contents, summaries, prior conversation)

quality.description: How well the LLM performed on this task

followed_up_with.description: If the result was then sent to another LLM, which one
